name: TheFatRat
description: '''Christian Friedrich Johannes B칲ttner''' ({{IPA|de|틛k투톩sti퍒an 틛f투톩d투톩칞 jo틛han톛s 틛b툺tn톓|lang}}), known professionally as '''TheFatRat''', is a German DJ, record producer and musician. His genre is often described as "[[Glitch (music)|glitch-hop]]." His 2016 extended play ''Jackpot'' reached 23 on the [[Billboard (magazine)|Billboard]] [[Dance/Electronic Albums]] chart. He peaked at 25 on Billboard's Next Big Sound chart in February 2015.
